title: Hieracium virgaureiforme
intro: Hieracium virgaureiforme, also known as hawkweed or yellow hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium virgaureiforme include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
